items.objective: Turn R10 instability evidence into category-level remediation rules for tool-scope, contradiction, hallucination.
acceptance_criteria: The R10 unstable categories remain excluded from canonical promotion until stability improves.
The R12 report records instability drivers and affected case IDs.
A rerun can compare instability_rate before and after remediation.

items.objective: Add reliable oracle or gold-anchor coverage for top evidence gaps: contradiction, temporal-reasoning, value-alignment, overthinking.
acceptance_criteria: Each selected category has explicit anchor evidence or a documented reason deterministic checks are unsafe.
Temporal checks are deterministic where date/timezone facts are structurally available.
Non-deterministic categories use curated gold anchors rather than fragile regex scoring.

items.objective: Replace or revise low-signal cases in tool-scope, contradiction, temporal-reasoning, value-alignment; initial queue: tool-scope-002, tool-scope-006, tool-scope-010, tool-scope-011, tool-scope-014, tool-scope-019, tool-scope-020, tool-scope-022.
acceptance_criteria: Rewritten cases increase model spread without becoming judge-unstable.
All case mutations pass corpus validation and preserve schema requirements.
Promotion remains draft until R10 reliability and R11 calibrated weighting agree.

items.objective: Use R11 anchor agreement and strictness bias to quarantine weak judge/category pairs before leaderboard or promotion decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Judge/category pairs below the calibration floor are marked as discounted or quarantined.
The calibrated leaderboard reports calibration drivers that affected weights.
At least one before/after report proves the weighting changed only evidence-backed cases.

items.objective: Require discrimination, judge stability, oracle compatibility, and calibrated case weight before a draft case can become canonical.
acceptance_criteria: A case with low reliability cannot be promoted even if it discriminates.
A case with oracle disagreement cannot be promoted without explicit review evidence.
The gate emits machine-readable reasons for every accepted and rejected case.
